mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of instances when UNRATE crosses the threshold, or the signal fails to predict direction in out-of-sample backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer demand expansion, which boosts corporate revenue forecasts and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, which supports near-term equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods following INDPRO increases, or the signal shows zero predictive power during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in tighter monetary policy and margin compression, which suppresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 65% of months following CPIAUCSL spikes above the threshold, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below random chance.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirm robust labor market expansion, which sustains consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative 60-day returns in > 55% of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product reflects stronger aggregate economic activity and corporate profit growth, which directly translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with GDPC1 growth over a 2-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a manufacturing contraction and weakening supply-side momentum, which triggers risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of periods following two consecutive INDPRO drops, or the threshold signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark.
